name: Grilled Tarragon Chicken with Mustard Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Pound the chicken breasts between sheets of plastic wrap using a mallet.
2. In a small bowl, combine mustard, chopped tarragon, and lime juice. Mix well with a fork.
3. Brush the mustard-tarragon mixture onto each chicken cutlet.
4. Grill the chicken until cooked through, about 4 minutes on each side.
5. Ensure the chicken is grilled evenly without overcooking.
Each serving contains approximately 179 calories; 90 milligrams of sodium; 73 milligrams of cholesterol; 3 grams of fat; 2 grams of carbohydrates; 28 grams of protein; trace fiber; and 15 percent of calories from fat.
